news_signals.snippet: Howie Liu, Airtable CEO: A Fortt Knox Update. # Howie Liu, Airtable CEO: A Fortt Knox Update. Airtable CEO Howie Liu says new flagship AI models enable a new product: Hyperagent. The dedicated, VM-based agent platform can run hours-long autonomous workflows across enterprise data, moving AI from shallow chat to structured, orchestrated work with built-in evaluation and coherence controls.
